topics.summary: With eight days until the June 3 local elections, DPK candidates lead in most major races—Seoul Mayor polling at 43–48% vs. PPP incumbent Oh Se-hun at 32%, Busan in a close contest—while conservative vote consolidation remains incomplete, with PPP party support stuck around 20–23%.

evidence_headlines.title: [MBC여론조사] 서울시장 가상 양자 대결‥정원오 48% VS 오세훈 32%
6·3 지방선거 결과와 관련해 더불어민주당 후보를 지지한다는 여론이 다수
[여론M] 보수 결집이라는데 국민의힘 지지율은 제자리‥왜?

topics.summary: Starbucks Korea's May 18 'Tank Day' promotional event was widely condemned as mocking the Gwangju Uprising; Shinsegae chairman Jung Yong-jin held a public apology press conference on May 26 after a boycott and criminal complaints spread, with the episode benefiting DPK and damaging PPP due to PPP leader Jang Dong-hyeok's framing around conservative mobilization.

evidence_headlines.title: 정용진 회장, 결국 직접 나선다···26일 '스벅 탱크데이 논란' 대국민 사과
스타벅스 '탱크데이', 정용진이 대국민 사과한다‥자체 진상조사 결과도 발표
"An immoral act by a vicious huckster"···President Lee Jae Myung harshly denounces the Starbucks '4·16 Siren Event'

topics.topic_en: Yoon Insurrection Trials Perjury Verdict Imminent
topics.summary: Following his February 2026 life sentence for leading the December 2024 insurrection, former President Yoon Suk-yeol faces an additional first-instance verdict on May 28 for alleged perjury during the Han Deok-su insurrection trial, with the special prosecutor seeking a two-year sentence.

evidence_headlines.title: '한덕수 재판 위증' 윤석열, 28일 1심 선고…특검 "징역 2년 선고해달라"
윤석열 '한덕수 재판 위증' 혐의 이번주 1심 선고
Yoon Suk Yeol: Former South Korean President handed life sentence for leading insurrection

topics.topic_en: DPK Prosecution Reform Special Prosecutor Bill
topics.summary: The ruling DPK is pushing a special prosecutor bill targeting alleged prosecutorial misconduct under the Yoon government, which includes a provision allowing the special prosecutor to withdraw charges; the PPP is framing this as 'self-acquittal' legislation designed to erase President Lee Jae-myung's pending criminal cases.

evidence_headlines.title: 민주당 "조작기소 바로잡을 특검 필요" vs 국민의힘 "셀프면죄"
與, '공소취소권 부여' 조작기소 특검법 발의…野 "셀프면죄"(종합)
청와대 달려간 국민의힘 '공소취소 특검법' 총공세

topics.topic_en: PPP Leadership Crisis Incomplete Conservative Rally
topics.summary: PPP chair Jang Dong-hyeok has weathered internal resignation calls but the party's national poll share remains stagnant at around 20–23%, well below the pre-presidential-election baseline, with analysts describing conservative mobilization as 'incomplete' ahead of the June 3 vote.

evidence_headlines.title: 장동혁 사퇴론 확산, 버티는 張…지방선거 코앞 혼돈의 국힘
[여론M] 보수 결집이라는데 국민의힘 지지율은 제자리‥왜?
이재명 대통령 지지율 61%, 민주당 45%·국민의힘 23%

topics.topic_en: President Lee Jae-myung Approval Rating Trends
topics.summary: President Lee Jae-myung's approval rating sits at 59–65%, slightly down from a post-inauguration peak; analysts attribute a recent dip partly to public debate over the special prosecutor bill's charge-withdrawal provision, while DPK retains a commanding 45–50% party support lead.

evidence_headlines.title: 이 대통령 지지율 65.5% 취임 후 최고‥민주당 50.5%·국힘 31.4%
이재명 대통령 지지율 61%, 민주당 45%·국민의힘 23%

topics.topic_en: Han Dong-hoon Independent Busan By-election Bid
topics.summary: Former PPP leader Han Dong-hoon is running as an independent in the Busan Buk-gu Gap by-election on June 3, currently trailing DPK candidate Ha Jeong-u 33% to 38%, in a race that tests whether Han can rebuild political relevance outside the party he was expelled from.

evidence_headlines.title: [MBC여론조사] 부산 북구갑 하정우 38% 한동훈 33%
한동훈, 부산 북갑 후보 등록…하정우·박민식·한동훈, 나란히 마을축제 참석

topics.topic_en: North Korea Artillery Destroyer Military Escalation
topics.summary: North Korea announced deployment of new long-range artillery systems capable of striking Seoul and commissioned a naval destroyer in May 2026, with Kim Jong-un issuing directives for 'swift and decisive' attack capabilities, raising cross-party calls for vigilance but generating limited domestic political polarization.

evidence_headlines.title: North Korea says it will deploy new artillery guns targeting Seoul
Korean Peninsula Update, May 12, 2026
[자막뉴스] "기습공격·속전속결로 끝낸다"...김정은의 섬뜩한 지시

method_notes: Captured via Anthropic API (Sonnet 4.6) with web_search for live Korean political coverage. Topic labels (topic_en) are stable handles for cross-snapshot rank comparison.
